name: Orange Habanero Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1 habanero (to achieve medium heat - add more if desired)
1/4 cup ginger pickle juice (or substitute fresh, 1 tsp sugar and a little water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the carrots and garlic with water until soft in the microwave.
(You could use them raw for a sharper flavor and crunchier texture.)
2. Put everything in the blender and puree until smooth.
3. Adjust flavors as needed (more lemon or salt might be good).
4. This salsa was delicious as a thick condiment with pasta with pesto,
and also a great topping on a cold potato salad today.
5. The sauce thickened overnight in the refrigerator, and I suspect it will
keep for about a week.
6. It's such a beautiful, bright orange color!
